# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Cyberpunk UI Refresh and AI Assist Enhancements
- Summary: Highlighting the recent UI refresh for CodeGrind's cyberpunk aesthetic and the expanded AI assistant capabilities, with a look at how users can leverage these features in problem-solving sessions.
- Slug: codegrind-cyberpunk-ui-updates
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-cyberpunk-ui-updates

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind has a revamped cyberpunk UI and upgraded AI assistant to streamline problem-solving: immersive visuals, responsive editor, and multi-model AI guidance designed to accelerate learning and engagement.
- CTA: Try the new UI and ask the AI assistant for problem-solving guidance in your next challenge.
- Visual brief: Static hero image showcasing CodeGrind's cyberpunk-themed UI: neon dashboards, code editor with syntax highlighting, and celebratory problem-solve visuals. Include subtle motion-free elements like glowing outlines to convey polish without animation.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
